challenge.title: Korak 7
challenge.description:
Sada je vreme da dodamo elemente forme za prikupljanje informacija o ocenama učenika.

Počnite dodavanjem još jednog label elementa sa tekstom Student Grade: i atributom for podešenim na "grade".

Zatim, ispod vašeg label elementa, dodajte input element sa atributom type podešenim na "number". Atributi name i id treba da budu podešeni na "grade". Atribut placeholder treba da bude podešen na "E.g., 4". Napokon, vaš broj input bi trebalo da bude obavezan.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Parent Teacher Conference Form

Please fill out the form below to help schedule your parent-teacher conference.

Student Information

tests.text: You should have a total of two label elements on the page.
Your second label element should have the text Student Grade: . Don't forget the space after the colon.
Your second label element should have a for attribute.
Your second label element's for attribute should have the value "grade".
You should have two input elements on the page.
Your second input element should be below your second label element.
Your second input element should have a type attribute set to "number".
Your second input element should have a name attribute set to "grade".
Your second input element should have an id attribute set to "grade".
Your second input element should have a placeholder attribute set to "E.g., 4".
Your second input element should have a required attribute.
